summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of checklist app with multiple advanced features. Basic functionality works well but critical local storage persistence issue identified.

critical_bugs.issue: Local storage persistence not working - localStorage returns null values causing tasks to disappear between sessions
critical_bugs.impact: Users lose all their tasks when page refreshes or app is reopened

critical_bugs.issue: Swipe left/right gestures for delete/complete not functional
critical_bugs.impact: Core user interaction feature not working as specified

critical_bugs.issue: Deleted section with reddish tint not appearing when tasks are deleted
critical_bugs.impact: Deleted tasks functionality not working, no restore capability

ui_bugs.issue: Completed tasks sometimes disappear from completed section

integration_issues.issue: Tasks not persisting in local storage between page loads

passed_tests: App loading and basic UI rendering
Quick add task functionality (basic text input)
Priority selection and display (high/medium/low with color coding)
Completed section with greenish tint background
Edit dialog opening with all required fields
Drag handles visibility on active tasks
success_percentage: frontend: 65% - Basic functionality works but critical persistence and interaction features failing
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical local storage persistence issue in useLocalStorage hook - tasks are not being saved/loaded properly. Implement swipe gesture functionality for task completion/deletion. Fix soft delete feature to show deleted section with restore capability.
